h1: Custom Gifts for Babies & Toddlers for Brand Awareness
metaTitle: Custom Babies Toddlers Gifts | Perfect Imprints
metaDescription: Order custom babies toddlers gifts like bubble wands, putty, and yo-yos. Perfect for giveaway events. Get quotes at Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Our custom gifts for babies and toddlers are made from child-safe, durable materials like BPA-free plastic, non-toxic putty, and soft fabrics. These products are designed to withstand rough handling while keeping little ones engaged. From classic yo-yos and bungee rockets to fidget cubes and cloud putty, each item offers a tactile experience that parents appreciate.

For bulk buyers, these items provide excellent decoration surfaces. Crowns and Ad Pops can be screen-printed with your logo, while putty containers and bubble wands accept full-color labels. The materials hold up well to branding, ensuring your message stays visible even after repeated use. Rubber kick balls and sock monkeys can be debossed or embroidered for a premium feel.

Whether you're a marketing director planning a family-friendly event or a safety manager looking for non-toxic giveaways, these products meet safety standards for young children. Minimum order quantities are low enough for small businesses but scale efficiently for large campaigns. Order samples to test quality before committing to bulk production.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom babies toddlers gifts?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. For most items like bubble wands and yo-yos, the minimum is 50-100 pieces. Crowns and Ad Pops may have lower MOQs, while custom plush like sock monkeys may require 250+. Contact us for specific MOQs.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer samples for most products. You can order a blank or decorated sample to evaluate quality, safety, and decoration appearance. Sample fees are typically waived for large bulk orders.

faqs.q: What decoration methods work best for these products?
faqs.a: Screen printing and pad printing work well on hard surfaces like plastic yo-yos and bubble wands. For soft items like putty containers and fidget cubes, full-color digital printing is available. Embroidery is best for plush toys like sock monkeys.

faqs.q: Are these products safe for children under 3?
faqs.a: Most items are tested for safety and meet CPSIA guidelines for ages 3+. Products like putty and small parts may not be suitable for children under 3 due to choking hazards. Always check product age recommendations before ordering.

faqs.q: How long does production and shipping take?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 10-15 business days after artwork approval. Rush production is available for an additional fee. Shipping within the US typically takes 3-7 days depending on the method chosen.

heroAltText: Custom babies and toddlers gifts including bubble wands, yo-yos, and fidget cubes with screen-printed logos on a bright background
